assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract keeps the selection column and Sale ID visible during horizontal scrolling so people do not lose row context
assertionResults.title: keeps the selection column and Sale ID visible during horizontal scrolling so people do not lose row context

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract makes active sort and filter state visually obvious so the current table state is easy to read
assertionResults.title: makes active sort and filter state visually obvious so the current table state is easy to read

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract shows page-range context and a visible overflow hint so people know where they are in the results
assertionResults.title: shows page-range context and a visible overflow hint so people know where they are in the results

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract commits a clear typed single-select match on dismiss so values do not snap back to the previous selection
assertionResults.title: commits a clear typed single-select match on dismiss so values do not snap back to the previous selection

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract keeps exact typed single-select queries active so typing UPRN does not reopen the full option list
assertionResults.title: keeps exact typed single-select queries active so typing UPRN does not reopen the full option list

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract keeps command-bar actions visibly labelled so compact layouts do not fall back to icon-only buttons
assertionResults.title: keeps command-bar actions visibly labelled so compact layouts do not fall back to icon-only buttons

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract enters compact mode only when browser zoom is above 120 percent
assertionResults.title: enters compact mode only when browser zoom is above 120 percent

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract keeps the search actions visually grouped with the active field instead of detaching them to the far edge
assertionResults.title: keeps the search actions visually grouped with the active field instead of detaching them to the far edge

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract shows dynamic required markers and a visible unavailable note in sales search so disabled search states are explained
assertionResults.title: shows dynamic required markers and a visible unavailable note in sales search so disabled search states are explained

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract lets Canvas own sales-record navigation loading and ignores repeat activations while navigation is pending
assertionResults.title: lets Canvas own sales-record navigation loading and ignores repeat activations while navigation is pending

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract gives the search and prefilter areas a visible but restrained shadow so they read as control sections
assertionResults.title: gives the search and prefilter areas a visible but restrained shadow so they read as control sections

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract renders Flagged for Review as yes/no chips instead of raw booleans so scanning is faster
assertionResults.title: renders Flagged for Review as yes/no chips instead of raw booleans so scanning is faster

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract abbreviates summary flags but preserves the full values in tooltips so dense flag sets remain readable
assertionResults.title: abbreviates summary flags but preserves the full values in tooltips so dense flag sets remain readable

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract uses semantic mapping helpers for task status and summary flags so future values can fall back safely
assertionResults.title: uses semantic mapping helpers for task status and summary flags so future values can fall back safely

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract uses visible button labels for inline grid actions instead of icon-only or clickable text links without button semantics
assertionResults.title: uses visible button labels for inline grid actions instead of icon-only or clickable text links without button semantics

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract shows a header-level new-tab cue on Address and keeps link-level aria context
assertionResults.title: shows a header-level new-tab cue on Address and keeps link-level aria context

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract gives tag cells visible overflow and a small vertical buffer so pill borders do not clip at the row edge
assertionResults.title: gives tag cells visible overflow and a small vertical buffer so pill borders do not clip at the row edge

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract shows compact prefilter selection summaries and reset notices so dependent filter changes are easier to understand
assertionResults.title: shows compact prefilter selection summaries and reset notices so dependent filter changes are easier to understand

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract keeps required markers on the actual required prefilter controls and shows a legend for what the star means
assertionResults.title: keeps required markers on the actual required prefilter controls and shows a legend for what the star means

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract keeps the column date filter apply button visible but disabled until an end date is selected
assertionResults.title: keeps the column date filter apply button visible but disabled until an end date is selected

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract shows a visible UPRN input hint so the digit-only restriction is obvious before typing
assertionResults.title: shows a visible UPRN input hint so the digit-only restriction is obvious before typing

assertionResults.fullName: grid usability contract strengthens selected-row treatment so multi-select actions are easier to verify before acting
assertionResults.title: strengthens selected-row treatment so multi-select actions are easier to verify before acting
